description: HERE provides location technology products and services, including positioning and asset/device tracking capabilities. Its platform documentation covers APIs for location, mapping, routing, IAM, and tracking use cases.
summary: HERE exposes two documented developer HTTP APIs on this domain scope: the HERE Network Positioning API v2 and the HERE Tracking API; Positioning accepts either HERE app API keys or HERE OAuth bearer tokens, while Tracking requires a HERE Tracking bearer token obtained via its login flow.
